answers: Start running: begin with walk/run intervals (run 1 min, walk 2 min), gradually increase running time over weeks.
Running benefits: improves heart health, burns calories, boosts mood (runner's high), strengthens bones, and reduces stress.
Beginner tips: invest in good running shoes, warm up first, don't increase mileage more than 10% per week, and rest days matter.
Couch to 5K: 8-week program alternating walking and running. By week 8 you can run 30 minutes straight. Free apps available.
